name: meditation-guide-ai-mcp
description: > **By [MEOK AI Labs](https://meok.ai)** — Generate guided meditations, breathing exercises, and mindfulness practices. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: get_meditation
tools.description: Get a guided meditation script. Styles: calm, focus, sleep, stress. Duration adjusts detail level.

tools.name: track_session
tools.description: Log a completed meditation session. Mood scores 1-10 (1=worst, 10=best).

tools.name: get_breathing_exercise
tools.description: Get a structured breathing exercise. Techniques: box, 478, energize, calm.

tools.name: suggest_practice
tools.description: Suggest a meditation or breathing practice based on your goal and available time. Goals: general, sleep, focus, stress, energy.
